# Evaluation Snapshot
## Prompt
Explore an undefined problem where the behavior is still unclear.
## Expected selection
do_not_use
## Why
The task is purely exploratory and behavior is still undefined, so it is not yet a bounded TDD slice.
## Expected object
A deflection toward exploration or discovery rather than test-first implementation.
## Boundary notes
Do not use this skill until the behavior can be named as a small, testable slice.
## Verification hooks
The response should avoid pretending the behavior is already specified or bounded.
